indicators.label: Shiller CAPE Ratio
indicators.description: 10-year inflation-adjusted P/E; high values signal large downside risk
indicators.note: This indicator requires manual data entry or a custom scraper. Source: https://www.multpl.com/shiller-pe

indicators.label: Buffett Indicator
indicators.description: Market cap vs GDP; extreme readings signal market detached from economy
indicators.note: This indicator requires manual data entry or a custom scraper. Source: https://www.longtermtrends.net/market-cap-to-gdp-the-buffett-indicator/

indicators.label: Trailing P/E (S&P 500)
indicators.description: Current price vs earnings; elevated readings mean little margin of safety
indicators.note: This indicator requires manual data entry or a custom scraper. Source: https://www.macrotrends.net/2577/sp-500-pe-ratio-price-to-earnings-chart

indicators.label: Margin Debt
indicators.description: Borrowed money in market; sharp drop after peak signals forced selling
indicators.note: This indicator requires manual data entry or a custom scraper. Source: https://www.finra.org/investors/learn-to-invest/advanced-investing/margin-statistics

indicators.label: S&P 500 Dividend Yield
indicators.description: Very low yield means premium prices paid with minimal income cushion
indicators.note: This indicator requires manual data entry or a custom scraper. Source: https://www.multpl.com/s-p-500-dividend-yield

indicators.label: Price-to-Sales (S&P 500)
indicators.description: Price vs revenue; harder to manipulate than earnings-based metrics
indicators.note: This indicator requires manual data entry or a custom scraper. Source: https://www.multpl.com/s-p-500-price-to-sales

indicators.label: Tobin's Q Ratio
indicators.description: Market value vs asset replacement cost; above 1 means overpaying for assets
indicators.note: This indicator requires manual data entry or a custom scraper. Source: https://www.longtermtrends.net/tobins-q/
